name: Suguro
description: Suguro is a thief that was part of Jako's gang.      ~!He is the first of the thieves to find and attack Naruto Uzumaki and Sasuke Uchiha after they were linked together by Jako's Chakra Liquid technique, when Naruto wanted to pee and Sasuke refused to go with him (as they were both linked). They started arguing when they came across Suguro who was apparently himself peeing. He quickly dashed towards them and attacked them with his Manriki-gusari, but was later defeated by both of them. !~    Debut: Naruto Shippūden Episode #194    (source: http://naruto.wikia.com/wiki/Suguro)
